title: APPENDIX: DETERMINING THE IMPULSE RESPONSE
summary: The page closes a graphical convolution example with Figure 2.29 at t = 2.85 seconds and begins Section 2.8 on determining the impulse response. It explains that the impulse response of an LTIC system can be written as an impulse term plus characteristic modes, then introduces an auxiliary system S0 and derives differential-equation forms for the characteristic-mode-only impulse response yn(t).

figures.caption: Graphical convolution at step t = 2.85 seconds, showing two stacked signal plots: h(τ), x(t−τ), h(τ)x(t−τ), and the resulting y(t)
